privileged_info_summary: The task involves unpublishing a document in Nuxeo Platform. The setup creates: (1) an HR-Internal workspace at /default-domain/workspaces/HR-Internal (Workspace type), (2) an Employee-Portal section at /default-domain/sections/Employee-Portal (Section type), and (3) a File document named HR-Policy-2024-Draft with title 'HR Policy 2024 Draft' in the HR-Internal workspace. The document is then published to the Employee-Portal section using the Document.PublishToSection operation, which creates a proxy. The task objective is to remove the proxy from the Employee-Portal section while preserving the original document in the HR-Internal workspace. The data is synthetic (test PDFs from /workspace/data/ directory), but Nuxeo Platform 10.10 and the REST API implementation are real.
